Name: SO Coffee Roasters
Tips: Best specialty coffee in the city. Single-origin V60/Chemex.

Name: Matosinhos Beach
Tips: Wide Atlantic sand, lifeguarded. Go before 10:30 for space.

Name: O Gaveto
Tips: Definitive Porto seafood experience. Book 1 week ahead.

Name: Foz do Douro
Tips: Where the Douro meets the Atlantic. 1843 lighthouse, riverside gardens.

Name: Tram 1 (Passeio Alegre)
Tips: Oldest tram line in Europe (1872). ~25 min ride to Massarelos.

Name: Museu do Carro Eléctrico
Tips: 25 historic trams inside a 1915 power plant. Free tram ride included.

Name: Jardim do Palácio de Cristal
Address: Rua Dom Manuel II, Massarelos, Porto
Tips: Free-roaming peacocks. Western belvederes give the best Douro views.

Name: Museu Romântico da Quinta da Macieirinha
Tips: King Carlos Alberto of Sardinia died here in exile in 1849.

Name: The Yeatman Bar
Address: Rua do Choupelo 88, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia
Tips: Terrace overlooking all of Porto. Order a wine flight for sunset.

Name: Loca
Tips: Outstanding creative seafood, farewell dinner pick. Book 2-3 weeks ahead.
